text:
### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The customer support system connects to a knowledge base.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integrate Customer Support with Knowledge Base", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the customer support system with a knowledge base to provide users with relevant information and answers to their queries.

### Technical Description
The integration will involve connecting the customer support system to a knowledge base API, allowing users to access relevant information and answers to their queries. The integration will also involve implementing search functionality to enable users to search for specific information and answers.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and identify the most suitable knowledge base API to integrate with the customer support system.
- [ ] Implement the integration with the selected knowledge base API.
- [ ] Implement search functionality to enable users to search for specific information and answers.
- [ ] Test the integration to ensure it is working as expected.
- [ ] Document the integration and search functionality for future reference.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The collaboration software integrates with a file-sharing system.

### Response:
[{"title": "File-Sharing Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the collaboration software with a file-sharing system.

### Technical Description
The file-sharing system provides an API for file uploads and downloads. We need to develop a secure and efficient integration with the collaboration software.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research file-sharing system API and authentication mechanisms.
- [ ] Design a secure and scalable integration architecture.
- [ ] Implement file upload and download functionality in the collaboration software.
- [ ] Conduct thorough testing of the integration.

Labels: [backend, api]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The blogging platform features an SEO optimization tool.

### Response:
[{"title": "SEO Optimization Tool", "body": "### Objective
Implement a robust SEO optimization tool for the blogging platform.

### Technical Description
The tool should analyze the blog posts and provide recommendations for optimization.

### Tasks
- [ ] Develop a content analysis algorithm
- [ ] Implement a recommendation engine
- [ ] Integrate with the blogging platform API (labels: [backend, api])", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Content Analysis Algorithm", "body": "### Objective
Develop a content analysis algorithm to analyze blog posts and extract relevant data.

### Technical Description
The algorithm should be able to extract metadata, keywords, and other relevant information from the blog posts.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the algorithm
- [ ] Integrate with the recommendation engine (labels: [backend, algorithm])", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Recommendation Engine", "body": "### Objective
Implement a recommendation engine to provide optimization recommendations to the blogging platform users.

### Technical Description
The engine should be able to analyze the content analysis data and provide personalized recommendations.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the engine
- [ ] Integrate with the content analysis algorithm (labels: [backend, api])", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Integration with Blogging Platform API", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the SEO optimization tool with the blogging platform API.

### Technical Description
The integration should enable seamless data exchange between the tool and the blogging platform.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the API integration
- [ ] Test the integration (labels: [backend, api])", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The e-learning platform connects with a learning management system.

### Response:
[{"title": "E-learning Platform API Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the e-learning platform with a learning management system.

### Technical Description
The integration will require creating an API endpoint on the e-learning platform to receive course data from the learning management system.

### Tasks
- [ ] Create API endpoint on e-learning platform
- [ ] Implement API request handling to receive course data from learning management system
- [ ] Test API endpoint with sample course data", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Learning Management System Connection", "body": "### Objective
Establish a connection between the e-learning platform and the learning management system.

### Technical Description
The connection will require configuring the learning management system to send course data to the e-learning platform.

### Tasks
- [ ] Configure learning management system to send course data
- [ ] Implement data reception and processing on e-learning platform
- [ ] Test connection with sample course data", "labels": ["backend", "integration"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The email marketing platform integrates with an analytics dashboard.

### Response:
[{"title": "Email Marketing Platform API Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate email marketing platform with analytics dashboard to provide real-time data insights.

### Technical Description
The integration will involve developing an API to connect the two platforms. The API will need to handle data processing and transmission to ensure seamless data flow. The platform will require authentication and authorization to ensure secure data transmission.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement API architecture
- [ ] Develop API endpoints for data transmission
- [ ] Implement authentication and authorization mechanisms
- [ ] Conduct API testing and debugging
- [ ] Deploy API to production environment
- [ ] Integrate API with analytics dashboard", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The online survey tool allows for exporting data to a spreadsheet application.

### Response:
[{"title": "Exportar dados para aplicação de planilha", "body": "### Objetivo\nExportar dados do survey para um arquivo CSV que possa ser importado em uma aplicação de planilha popular.\n\n### Descrição Técnica\nO sistema atualmente não oferece essa opção, portanto, é necessário implementar uma API que permita a exportação dos dados em formato CSV.\n\n### Tasks\n- [ ] Implementar API para exportar dados em CSV", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The mobile app features an in-app messaging system.

### Response:
[{"title": "In-App Messaging System", "body": "### Overview
The mobile app requires an in-app messaging system for users to communicate with each other.

### Technical Description
Implement a real-time messaging system using WebSockets or WebRTC.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the messaging system architecture.
- [ ] Develop the messaging system using WebSockets or WebRTC.
- [ ] Implement user authentication and authorization for messaging.
- [ ] Conduct performance and security testing for the messaging system.

Labels: [backend, api, messaging]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Mobile App Messaging API", "body": "### Overview
The mobile app requires a messaging API to enable real-time communication between users.

### Technical Description
Design and implement a RESTful API using a suitable programming language and framework (e.g., Node.js, Express.js).

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the API architecture.
- [ ] Implement API endpoints for sending and receiving messages.
- [ ] Implement user authentication and authorization for API requests.
- [ ] Conduct API testing and documentation.

Labels: [backend, api, messaging]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Frontend Integration", "body": "### Overview
The mobile app requires integration with the messaging system to enable users to send and receive messages.

### Technical Description
Implement the messaging system functionality in the mobile app frontend using a suitable framework (e.g., React Native, Flutter).

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the frontend architecture.
- [ ] Implement the messaging system functionality in the frontend.
- [ ] Conduct UI testing and user experience validation.

Labels: [frontend, messaging]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The CRM software connects with a marketing automation platform.

### Response:
[{"title": "CRM-Marketing Automation Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the CRM software with a marketing automation platform.

### Technical Description
The integration should allow for the seamless exchange of customer data and campaign information between the CRM and marketing automation platforms.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and select a marketing automation platform to integrate with the CRM.
- [ ] Design and implement the API integration between the CRM and marketing automation platforms.
- [ ] Test and validate the integration to ensure data consistency and accuracy.
- [ ] Deploy the integration to production and monitor for any issues.", "labels": ["integration", "api", "crm"]}, {"title": "CRM Data Mapping", "body": "### Objective
Map the CRM software's data structures to the marketing automation platform's data structures.

### Technical Description
The data mapping should be thorough and accurate to ensure seamless data exchange between the two platforms.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research the data structures of the CRM software and marketing automation platform.
- [ ] Create a data mapping plan to ensure accurate and consistent data exchange.
- [ ] Implement the data mapping and test for accuracy and consistency.", "labels": ["data", "mapping", "crm"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The healthcare application integrates with an electronic health record system.

### Response:
[{"title": "EHR Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the healthcare application with an electronic health record system.

### Technical Description
The integration will involve establishing a secure connection with the EHR system, retrieving patient data, and updating the healthcare application's database accordingly.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the EHR integration API.
- [ ] Configure the API to securely connect to the EHR system.
- [ ] Develop a data mapping mechanism to translate EHR data to the healthcare application's database.
- [ ] Test the EHR integration to ensure data accuracy and integrity.
- [ ] Implement CI/CD pipeline to automate EHR integration testing.

Labels: [backend, api, ehr]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The job search website relies on a resume parsing system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Resume Parsing System Development", "body": "### Objective
Develop a resume parsing system for the job search website.

### Description
The system should be able to extract relevant information from resumes, such as work experience, education, and skills.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the resume parsing algorithm.
- [ ] Integrate the algorithm with the job search website's backend.
- [ ] Develop a testing framework to ensure the system's accuracy.
- [ ] Implement data validation and error handling.

### Labels
- backend
- api", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "API Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the resume parsing system with the job search website's API.

### Description
The API should be able to receive resume data and return parsed information.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the API endpoints.
- [ ] Implement API security and authentication.
- [ ] Integrate the API with the job search website's frontend.

### Labels
- backend
- api", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Database Design", "body": "### Objective
Design a database schema to store parsed resume information.

### Description
The database should be able to store and retrieve resume data efficiently.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the database schema.
- [ ] Implement data indexing and caching.
- [ ] Develop a testing framework to ensure the database's accuracy.

### Labels
- database", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "CI/CD Pipeline Development", "body": "### Objective
Develop a CI/CD pipeline to automate the testing and deployment of the resume parsing system.

### Description
The pipeline should be able to build, test, and deploy the system efficiently.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the CI/CD pipeline.
- [ ] Integrate the pipeline with the job search website's development environment.
- [ ] Develop a testing framework to ensure the pipeline's accuracy.

### Labels
- ci/cd", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The streaming service employs a content recommendation engine.

### Response:
[{"title": "Content Recommendation Engine", "body": "### Objetivo
Implementar um sistema de recomendação de conteúdo para o streaming service.

### Descrição Técnica
O sistema deve considerar fatores como histórico de consumo, gênero de conteúdo e avaliações para fornecer recomendações personalizadas.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the architecture for the content recommendation engine.
- [ ] Develop the recommendation algorithm using machine learning techniques.
- [ ] Integrate the algorithm with the streaming service's database.
- [ ] Implement API endpoints for retrieving recommendations.
- [ ] Conduct unit tests and integration tests for the recommendation engine.

Labels: [backend, api, machine-learning]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The project management tool synchronizes with a time tracking system.

### Response:
[{"title": "API Integration with Time Tracking System", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrate the project management tool with a time tracking system to enable seamless synchronization.

### Descrição Técnica
The integration will be done using RESTful APIs, utilizing JSON data formats for communication.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design API endpoints for user and project data
- [ ] Implement API calls to retrieve and update data
- [ ] Test API integration with time tracking system", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Synchronization Mechanism", "body": "### Objetivo
Implement a synchronization mechanism to ensure data consistency between the project management tool and the time tracking system.

### Descrição Técnica
The mechanism will utilize a queue-based approach to handle data updates and ensure that changes are propagated correctly.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the synchronization mechanism
- [ ] Test the synchronization mechanism with various scenarios", "labels": ["backend", "infrastructure"]}, {"title": "Data Modeling and Storage", "body": "### Objetivo
Design and implement the data model for storing project and user data in the project management tool.

### Descrição Técnica
The data model will be designed to accommodate the requirements of the time tracking system and ensure efficient data retrieval.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the data model for projects and users
- [ ] Implement data storage using a suitable database technology", "labels": ["backend", "database"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The accounting software integrates with a tax calculation system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Tax Calculation Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the accounting software with a tax calculation system.

### Technical Description
The integration will require a RESTful API to be implemented in the accounting software. The API will be responsible for sending and receiving data with the tax calculation system. The system will be developed using Node.js and Express.js.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the API using Node.js and Express.js.
- [ ] Implement data validation and error handling in the API.
- [ ] Test the API using Postman and cURL.
- [ ] Deploy the API to a cloud provider (e.g. AWS, Azure).
- [ ] Configure CI/CD pipeline for automated testing and deployment.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:

### Input:
The social media platform connects to an email notification system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Email Notification System Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate social media platform with email notification system.

### Technical Description
The social media platform will connect to the email notification system to send notifications to users. This integration will require API calls to the email notification system and handling of errors and exceptions.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research email notification system APIs and requirements.
- [ ] Design API calls to email notification system.
- [ ] Implement API calls to email notification system.
- [ ] Test API calls to email notification system.
- [ ] Handle errors and exceptions in API calls to email notification system.

", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The product management tool features a roadmap visualization system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Implementação do sistema de visualização de roadmap", "body": "### Objetivo
Desenvolver um sistema de visualização de roadmap para o gerenciamento de produtos.

### Descrição Técnica
O sistema deve ser capaz de renderizar um mapa de roadmap com linhas e setas que representem as etapas e os passos do roadmap. Deve ser possível adicionar e remover etapas e passos do mapa.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implementar a lógica para renderizar o mapa de roadmap.
- [ ] Adicionar funcionalidade para adicionar e remover etapas e passos do mapa.
- [ ] Testar o sistema para garantir que o mapa seja renderizado corretamente.", "labels": ["backend", "api", "architecture"]}, {"title": "Integração com APIs de produtos", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar o sistema de visualização de roadmap com as APIs de produtos para obter os dados necessários para renderizar o mapa.

### Descrição Técnica
Deve ser possível chamar as APIs de produtos para obter as informações de etapas e passos do roadmap e renderizar o mapa com essas informações.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implementar a chamada às APIs de produtos para obter os dados de etapas e passos.
- [ ] Integrar as chamadas às APIs com a lógica do sistema de visualização de roadmap.
- [ ] Testar a integração para garantir que os dados sejam obtidos corretamente.", "labels": ["backend", "api", "integration"]}]

### Input:
The applicant tracking software integrates with a candidate sourcing system.

### Response:
[{"title": "ATS Integration with Candidate Sourcing System", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the applicant tracking software with the candidate sourcing system to streamline the hiring process.

### Description
The integration will enable seamless data exchange between the two systems, allowing for real-time candidate tracking and management.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the API connection between the ATS and candidate sourcing system.
- [ ] Configure the data mapping and validation to ensure accurate and consistent data transfer.
- [ ] Test the integration to ensure it meets the requirements and is free of errors.", "labels": ["integration", "api", "backend"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The cloud infrastructure service connects with a resource provisioning system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Cloud Infrastructure Integration with Resource Provisioning System", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the cloud infrastructure service with a resource provisioning system to enable seamless provisioning and management of cloud resources.

### Technical Description
The integration will require the development of APIs and data models to facilitate the exchange of data between the cloud infrastructure service and the resource provisioning system. The APIs will need to handle requests and responses, and ensure data consistency and integrity.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement APIs for provisioning and managing cloud resources.
- [ ] Develop data models for cloud resources and provisioning requests.
- [ ] Implement data validation and consistency checks for provisioning requests.
- [ ] Test the integration with the resource provisioning system.
- [ ] Deploy the integration to production.

Labels: [backend, api]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The website monitoring tool features a downtime alert system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Downtime Alert System", "body": "### Objective
Implement a downtime alert system for the website monitoring tool.

### Technical Description
The system should send alerts to the administrator's email when the website is down or experiencing errors. The alert system should be customizable to allow the administrator to set thresholds for alerting.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the alert system architecture
- [ ] Implement email alert sending functionality
- [ ] Configure alert thresholds", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Website Monitoring API", "body": "### Objective
Create a RESTful API to monitor the website's status and performance.

### Technical Description
The API should provide endpoints for monitoring the website's uptime, response time, and error rates. The API should also include authentication and authorization mechanisms to ensure only authorized users can access the data.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the API architecture
- [ ] Implement API endpoints for monitoring
- [ ] Implement authentication and authorization", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Alert System Configuration", "body": "### Objective
Provide a user-friendly interface for configuring the downtime alert system.

### Technical Description
The configuration interface should allow administrators to set alert thresholds, customize email templates, and schedule alerts. The interface should be accessible via the website's dashboard.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the configuration interface
- [ ] Implement configuration interface functionality
- [ ] Test configuration interface", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Database Design", "body": "### Objective
Design a database schema to store website monitoring data.

### Technical Description
The database should store data on website uptime, response time, and error rates. The schema should be designed to support efficient querying and retrieval of data.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the database schema
- [ ] Implement database schema in a chosen database management system", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "CI/CD Pipeline", "body": "### Objective
Set up a CI/CD pipeline to automate testing, building, and deployment of the website monitoring tool.

### Technical Description
The pipeline should include steps for testing, building, and deploying the tool. The pipeline should be integrated with a version control system and a cloud-based infrastructure provider.

### Tasks
- [ ] Set up the CI/CD pipeline
- [ ] Configure pipeline steps for testing, building, and deploying", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Test Cases", "body": "### Objective
Write test cases for the downtime alert system, API, and configuration interface.

### Technical Description
The test cases should cover scenarios for normal and error conditions. The test cases should be written in a testing framework and should include test data and expected results.

### Tasks
- [ ] Write test cases for downtime alert system
- [ ] Write test cases for API
- [ ] Write test cases for configuration interface", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Backend Infrastructure", "body": "### Objective
Set up the backend infrastructure for the website monitoring tool.

### Technical Description
The infrastructure should include a cloud-based server, a load balancer, and a database. The infrastructure should be scalable and secure.

### Tasks
- [ ] Set up the cloud-based server
- [ ] Set up the load balancer
- [ ] Set up the database", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Frontend Infrastructure", "body": "### Objective
Set up the frontend infrastructure for the website monitoring tool.

### Technical Description
The infrastructure should include a cloud-based server, a load balancer, and a content delivery network. The infrastructure should be scalable and secure.

### Tasks
- [ ] Set up the cloud-based server
- [ ] Set up the load balancer
- [ ] Set up the content delivery network", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:

### Input:
The video editing software integrates with a color grading system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com sistema de cores", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar o software de edição de vídeo com o sistema de cores para fornecer funcionalidade de graduação de cores para os usuários.

### Descrição Técnica
A integração deve ser feita via API, utilizando tecnologia de API RESTful. O sistema de cores deve ser acessível via uma URL específica e devolver uma resposta em formato JSON.

### Tasks
- [ ] Desenvolver a API para integração com o sistema de cores.
- [ ] Implementar chamadas à API no software de edição de vídeo.
- [ ] Testar a integração e garantir que o sistema de cores seja acedido corretamente.

", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The enterprise resource planning system connects with a supply chain management system.

### Response:
[{"title": "ERP-SCM Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) system with the Supply Chain Management (SCM) system.

### Technical Description
The ERP system will be connected to the SCM system using API calls. The integration will be bi-directional, allowing data to be exchanged between the two systems.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the API endpoints for the ERP-SCM integration.
- [ ] Implement the API calls between the ERP and SCM systems.
- [ ] Test the API calls for data consistency and integrity.
- [ ] Deploy the integrated system to production.

Labels: [backend, api]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "SCM System Requirements", "body": "### Objective
Define the technical requirements for the Supply Chain Management (SCM) system.

### Technical Description
The SCM system will need to integrate with the ERP system, as well as other systems, such as inventory management and shipping. The system will require APIs for data exchange, as well as a database to store inventory and order data.

### Tasks
- [ ] Gather requirements from stakeholders for the SCM system.
- [ ] Design the database schema for the SCM system.
- [ ] Design the API endpoints for the SCM system.
- [ ] Implement the SCM system using the designed database and API endpoints.
- [ ] Test the SCM system for data consistency and integrity.
- [ ] Deploy the SCM system to production.

Labels: [backend, api, database]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The remote desktop software features a session recording system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Remote Desktop Session Recording", "body": "### Objective
Implement session recording feature for remote desktop software.

### Technical Description
The session recording system should record user interactions, such as keyboard and mouse inputs, and store them securely. The system should also allow for playback and editing of recorded sessions.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the architecture for the session recording system.
- [ ] Develop the backend API for recording and playback.
- [ ] Implement frontend interface for users to initiate and control recordings.
- [ ] Integrate the recording system with the existing remote desktop software.
- [ ] Test the recording system for reliability and security.

#labels: backend, api, architecture", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Input:
The time tracking software integrates with an invoicing system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com sistema de faturamento", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar a aplicação de tempo de trabalho com o sistema de faturamento para automatizar a geração de notas fiscais.

### Descrição Técnica
A integração será feita através de APIs, permitindo que as informações de tempo de trabalho sejam enviadas automaticamente ao sistema de faturamento. O sistema de faturamento deve ser capaz de processar essas informações e gerar notas fiscais personalizadas.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implementar API de integração com o sistema de faturamento
- [ ] Desenvolver lógica de negócios para processar informações de tempo de trabalho e gerar notas fiscais", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:

### Input:
The SaaS management tool connects with a license management system.

### Response:
[{"title": "SaaS Management Tool - Integration with License Management System", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the SaaS management tool with a license management system to enable seamless license management for users.

### Technical Description
The integration will involve API calls to retrieve license information, verify user credentials, and update user profiles accordingly.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement API endpoints for retrieving and updating license information.
- [ ] Develop authentication and authorization mechanisms to verify user credentials.
- [ ] Integrate with the license management system to retrieve and update license information.
- [ ] Test and validate the integration to ensure seamless functionality.

### Input:

### Response:
[{"title": "Implementar Sistema de Segurança para Website", "body": "### Objetivo
Desenvolver um sistema de segurança para proteger o website de ataques malintencionados e manter a segurança dos dados dos usuários.

### Descrição Técnica
O sistema de segurança deve incluir:
* Verificação de tokens de autenticação
* Validação de URLs para evitar ataques de Injection de Script
* Proteção contra ataques de Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
* Proteção contra ataques de Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)

### Tasks
- [ ] Implementar verificação de tokens de autenticação
- [ ] Implementar validação de URLs para evitar ataques de Injection de Script
- [ ] Implementar proteção contra ataques de Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
- [ ] Implementar proteção contra ataques de Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)
- [ ] Testar e depurar o sistema de segurança

A integração deve incluir:
* Chamadas REST para comunicar-se com a API
* Verificação de tokens de autenticação para autorizar as chamadas
* Tratamento de erros e exceções

### Tasks

- [ ] Implementar verificação de tokens de autenticação para autorizar as chamadas
- [ ] Implementar tratamento de erros e exceções
- [ ] Testar e depurar a integração

### Tasks
- [ ] Implementar interface de usuário para monitorar o sistema de segurança
- [ ] Implementar funções para configurar as regras de segurança
- [ ] Implementar integração com a API do website
- [ ] Testar e depurar a ferramenta

labels: [frontend, security]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]
